label: plain_text
text:
The set Q of rational numbers is a subset of the set R of real numbes, and
we write Q c R.
IfA is the set of all divisors of 56 and B the set of all prime divisors of 56.
then B is a subset of A and we write B c A.
LetA = {1, 3, 5} and B = {x : x is an odd natural number less than 6}. Then
A c B and B c A and hence A = B.
Let A = { a, é, i, o, u} and B = { a, b, c, d}. Then A is not a subset of B
also B is not a subset of A.
